messages.login.recovery_sent: If account exists, a recovery code was sent to email. Code expires in 2 minutes.
messages.login.provide_reset_fields: Provide username, code and new password.
messages.login.password_updated: Password updated. You can log in now.
messages.module.section_in_progress_copy: This page is prepared in the dashboard and ready for upcoming implementation.
messages.dashboard.operations_copy: Actionable context for server health, headroom, and quick reporting.
messages.dashboard.pin_hint: Pin users or containers to keep them visible here.
messages.dashboard.admin_observatory_copy: Live server telemetry and container memory map
messages.logs.title: Nebula Core Logs
messages.logs.subtitle: Live runtime stream with compact severity highlighting.

messages.plugins.subtitle: Runtime status, resource telemetry, actions, logs and permissions overview.
messages.settings.title: Panel Settings
messages.settings.hero_copy: Shape your workspace the way you like it. This page brings together personal appearance preferences, language, security, mail, infrastructure, and platform policy controls in one place.
messages.settings.choose_profile_behavior: Choose how your workspace looks and behaves for this profile.
messages.settings.personal_copy: Adjust the workspace for yourself without changing how the panel looks for anyone else.
messages.settings.choose_theme_preview: Choose a theme to preview its style direction.
messages.settings.compact_tables: Use compact tables across the panel
messages.settings.remember_sidebar_groups: Remember expanded groups in the sidebar
messages.settings.language_regional_copy: Localize text, dates, number formatting and timezone behavior for the current user.
messages.settings.workspace_preferences_copy: Save your personal workspace choices for this browser and keep the panel consistent across visits.
messages.settings.default_page_and_sidebar_memory: Default landing page and sidebar memory
messages.settings.per_user_panel_behavior: Per-user panel behavior in this browser
messages.settings.admin_modules_and_policy: Administrative modules and panel-wide policy sections
messages.settings.security_and_operations_categor: Security and operations categories in the dashboard
messages.settings.assigned_workspace_modules: Assigned workspace modules available to your account
messages.settings.theme_catalog_failed: Theme catalog could not be loaded, so the default theme is being used.
messages.settings.theme_catalog_unavailable: Theme catalog is temporarily unavailable, so the default theme is being used.
messages.settings.default_theme_description: This theme updates the color palette and visual tone of the panel for your profile only.
messages.settings.theme_apply_failed: The selected theme could not be applied.
messages.settings.loaded_preferences: Loaded your saved workspace preferences for {user}.
messages.settings.defaults_loaded: Saved values could not be restored, so the default workspace preferences were loaded.
messages.settings.saved_status: Saved your workspace preferences for {user} at {time}.
messages.settings.reset_status: Workspace preferences were restored to their default values for this profile.
messages.settings.page_status: Choose how your workspace looks and behaves for this profile.
messages.users.no_users_db: No users found in this database.
messages.users.operational_error: Operational Error: DB Locked or Access Denied
messages.users.modify_credentials: Modify user credentials and system permissions
messages.users.leave_blank_preserve: Leave blank to preserve current key
messages.adduser.select_db: Select DB or enter new DB name
messages.adduser.title: Create New User
messages.adduser.subtitle: Create an account, assign a role, and prepare access in a single flow.
messages.adduser.select_role_details: Select a role to see details.
messages.projects.subtitle: Group containers into coherent delivery tracks, inspect workload spread, and manage links without bouncing between sections.
messages.projects.search_placeholder: Search project by name, description, tag...
messages.userpanel.two_factor_copy: Protect this account with time-based one-time codes.
messages.userpanel.google_authenticator_help: Use Google Authenticator. Scan QR code, then enter the current 6-digit code in `123-456` format.
messages.userpanel.twofa_active_disable: 2FA is active. Enter a current authenticator code to disable.
messages.settings.sections_copy: Workspace preferences, security, mail, ports, performance, certificates, and observability.
messages.settings.profile_access_level_copy: Settings shown here adapt to the access level of the current profile.
messages.settings.security_baseline_copy: Shape authentication expectations, sensitive action safeguards, and baseline account protection rules.
messages.settings.require_2fa_before_continue: Require every user without 2FA to enable 2FA before continuing
messages.settings.step_up_auth_destructive: Require step-up authentication for destructive actions
messages.settings.alert_new_device_signins: Alert users about new device or browser sign-ins
messages.settings.mail_delivery_title: Mail Delivery, Filtering And Outbound Policy
messages.settings.mail_delivery_copy: Control outbound delivery style, queue behavior, filtering rules, and inbound safety checks.
messages.settings.prefer_spf_dkim_alignment: Prefer aligned SPF and DKIM for outgoing mail
messages.settings.unique_panel_mail_copy: Configure how personal relay addresses should be created, routed, filtered, and protected.
messages.settings.enable_unique_panel_mail: Enable unique panel mail addresses for users
messages.settings.allow_alias_opt_out: Allow users to opt out of public alias routing
messages.settings.store_message_headers: Store message headers for troubleshooting and abuse review
messages.settings.strip_tracking_pixels: Strip known tracking pixels and remote beacons
messages.settings.reply_through_alias: Reply through alias instead of exposing the real mailbox
messages.settings.block_unknown_senders: Block unknown senders until the user explicitly allows them
messages.settings.ports_endpoints_title: Panel Ports, Endpoints And Edge Routing
messages.settings.ports_endpoints_copy: Define listener ports, ingress behavior, trusted proxy handling, and edge routing preferences.
messages.settings.reserve_admin_port: Reserve dedicated admin control port for future separation
messages.settings.core_connectivity_copy: Configure how the panel connects to Nebula Core, retries requests, validates transport, and handles degraded states.
messages.settings.enable_compressed_responses: Enable compressed API responses when available
messages.settings.fail_open_readonly: Fail open in read-only panel mode when core is degraded
messages.settings.panel_speed_copy: Control refresh cadence, client caching, chart retention, and how aggressively the panel follows live data.
messages.settings.lazy_load_modules: Lazy load heavy modules and charts
messages.settings.defer_noncritical_widgets: Defer non-critical dashboard widgets until idle
messages.settings.pause_hidden_tab_polls: Pause aggressive polling when the tab is hidden
messages.settings.operational_limits_title: Operational Limits, Quotas And Safety Caps
messages.settings.operational_limits_copy: Define the ceilings for uploads, log volume, file editing, mail relay, concurrency, and recovery guard rails.
messages.settings.daily_mail_quota: Daily mail relay quota per user
messages.settings.block_large_inbound_mail: Block oversized inbound relayed mail before forwarding
messages.settings.force_readonly_under_pressure: Force read-only mode under critical panel pressure
messages.settings.certificates_copy: Manage certificate source, renewal strategy, TLS posture, trust chains, and client-certificate expectations.
messages.settings.redirect_expired_clients: Redirect expired-certificate clients to maintenance page
messages.settings.observability_title: Audit, Metrics, Notifications And Recovery Signals
messages.settings.observability_copy: Shape what the panel records, which signals it sends, and how deeply it watches operational behavior.
messages.settings.realtime_admin_alerts: Send real-time alerts for critical admin and security events
messages.settings.mail_relay_telemetry: Track mail relay latency, bounce and queue telemetry
messages.settings.anonymize_low_value_ips: Anonymize low-value client IP data in exports
messages.settings.export_daily_health_snapshot: Export daily panel health snapshots for later diagnostics
messages.containers.title: Container Orchestration
messages.containers.execution_parameters_copy: Define execution parameters and resource limits
messages.containers.select_users_for_container: Select users who can view/manage this container
messages.containers.role_permissions_copy: Permissions apply to roles from `/roles/list` and are inherited by users via their `role_tag`.
messages.containers.restart_on_crash: Restart container on crash or system reboot
messages.containers.environment_settings_copy: Update runtime behavior, network routing and access policies
messages.containers.environment_controls_copy: Environment-level controls for runtime, ports and workspace access
messages.containers.environment_controls_descript: Use this panel to define what users can do in the workspace, how the service starts, and which published routes remain active.
messages.containers.select_routed_ports_hint: Select routed ports below to avoid malformed mappings.
messages.containers.assigned_users_copy: Each assigned user can now receive a container-specific role override without changing their global system rank.
messages.containers.role_permissions_matrix_copy: Matrix defines what each rank can do inside the workspace, explorer and environment settings.
messages.workspace.title: Container Workspace
messages.workspace.live_console_copy: Unified terminal for app console or restricted workspace shell, with live logs in one stream.
messages.workspace.explorer_copy: Explorer is restricted to workspace paths and reflects your role permissions.
messages.workspace.root_navigation_copy: Root navigation stays inside approved workspace mounts.
messages.workspace.explorer_access_copy: Read/write capabilities are loaded from your container role.
messages.workspace.quick_operations_copy: Apply common scenarios, then verify them with one click.
messages.workspace.minecraft_java_copy: Applies ports and startup command for a Java server baseline.
messages.workspace.steamcmd_dedicated_copy: Preset for typical dedicated game server startup flow.
messages.workspace.diagnostics_copy: Fast visibility for process, ports, memory and storage pressure.
messages.workspace.minecraft_ops_copy: Common in-game operations with one click from panel.
messages.workspace.web_service_ops_copy: Focus on logs, config files and restart flow for web apps and bots.
messages.workspace.database_ops_copy: Safe defaults for DB containers: logs, backup path checks, controlled restart.
messages.workspace.manage_environment_copy: Manage runtime behavior, network exposure, restart policy and access visibility for this environment.
messages.workspace.audit_trail_copy: Every important action in the workspace is recorded with actor, scope and time.
messages.workspace.permissions_checked: Permissions are checked before each sensitive action.
messages.workspace.published_port_rules_copy: Selected forwarding rules. Toggle published routes below to build this value safely.
messages.workspace.preallocated_ports_only: Only pre-allocated container ports can be enabled here.
messages.workspace.restart_policy_tip: Tip: if you are testing mods/builds, disabling auto-restart can make debugging easier.
messages.workspace.recent_environment_activity_co: Latest workspace actions for this container, including command, file and settings changes.
messages.workspace.select_file_to_preview: Select a file to view its contents.
